mapper.select:
SELECT he.id, he.name, he.job_id, hj.name AS job_name, he.department_id, hd.name AS department_name, he.parent_id, he.user_id, su.name AS user_name, he.company_id, rc.name AS company_name, he.work_email, he.work_phone, he.active FROM hr_employee he LEFT JOIN hr_job hj ON he.job_id = hj.id LEFT JOIN hr_department hd ON he.department_id = hd.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON he.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN res_company rc ON he.company_id = rc.id
AND (he.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND hj.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.jobName}, '%')
AND hd.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.departmentName}, '%')
AND su.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userName}, '%')
AND rc.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.companyName}, '%')
ORDER BY he.id DESC
